reasoning_model_1: The audio accurately synthesizes the text 'Hearing this news, I truly feel sorry for him.' without any errors. model_comparison: Both models accurately generate the text content. Model 1 (T1) is significantly better at capturing the specific paralinguistic feature of 'sadness'. T1 utilizes a breathy, lower-pitched, and slower delivery that sounds authentically somber. Model 2 (T2) sounds more like a standard narrator; the upward inflection on 'news' breaks the immersion of sadness, making it sound more conversational or slightly surprised.
